---
title: "The Sciences/Letters from Readers re: The Five Sexes"
description: "first public debug of the Intersex Society of North America"
date: 2026-06-27
image: /images/the_sciences_letter.png
image-alt: "page 3 of The Sciences V 33 (1993)"
categories: [intersex]
---


This issue printed a letter from me, responding to Anne Fausto-Sterling's article The Five Sexes, in which I first announced the Intersex Society
of North America and invited intersex people (and people close to them) to contact me. No website as yet, I had a PO Box in San Francisco.

The issue also contain letters from Suzanne Kessler and John Money, with a response to Money by Anne Fausto_Sterling.


Chase, C. Letters from Readers. The Sciences vol. 33 3 (1993).


<a href="/files/the_sciences_letters.pdf">Download pdf</a>




```{=html}
<iframe src="/files/the_sciences_letters.pdf" width="100%" height="800px" style="border: none;"></iframe>
```
